title: Signals and Systems
summary: This page derives a differential equation relating input x(t) and output y(t) for an RLC circuit, starting from an integro-differential equation and differentiating to obtain a second-order ODE. It introduces the compact differential operator notation D (where D = d/dt) and its inverse 1/D for integration, expressing the system equation in operator form. A footnote discusses mathematical subtleties regarding the non-commutativity of D and 1/D operators.
